TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka tou äugh ki ninnum ki wa'i ni-pa-toulam ta ti Je-sus tyni-æn ti Petrus-an, ti Jako-bus-an, ti Joannes-an-appa, ka ni-dyllough tyn pou-nni neini-æn tou voukkyn ka mahandagh.
Ka tou äugh ki ninnum ki wa'i ni-pa-toulam ta ti Je-sus tyni-æn ti Petrus-an, ti Jako-bus-an, ti Joannes-an-appa, ka ni-dyllough tyn pou-nni neini-æn tou voukkyn ka mahandagh.
S.TRANS: Ende nae ses dagen nam Jesus met hem Petrum ende Jacobum ende Jo annem fijnen broeder ende brachtse op eenen hoogen bergh alleen.
And after six days Jesus taketh Peter, James, and John his brother, and bringeth them up into an high mountain apart,
過了六天，耶穌帶着彼得、雅各，和雅各的兄弟約翰，暗暗地上了高山，

S.FORM: Ka ni-silala ta hauwei tyn tou æmæh neini-æn: ka ni-matyk-kanagh ta vlung tyn mama ki wai, ka ni-myh-poule ta pammien tyn mama ki ramæh.
Ka ni-silala ta hauwei tyn tou æmæh neini-æn: ka ni-matyk-kanagh ta vlung tyn mama ki wai, ka ni-myh-poule ta pammien tyn mama ki ramæh.
S.TRANS: Ende hy wiert boor Haer berandert ban gedaente ; eff lijn aengesicht blonck gegeliick de Sount mde shne leederen wierden wit ghtliick het licht. |
Ende Jesnus een kindeken tot hem geroepen hebbende stelde dat in het midden ban haer
And was transfigured before them: and his face did shine as the sun, and his raiment was white as the light.
就在他們面前變了形像，臉面明亮如日頭，衣裳潔白如光。

S.FORM: Ka k'ytta-ei, ka ni-kytt'an nein ta ti Moses, ti Elias-appa mat-tæ'i-tævægh tyni-æn.
Ka k'ytta-ei, ka ni-kytt'an nein ta ti Moses, ti Elias-appa mat-tæ'i-tævægh tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende [iet ban hae] wieeden ghelien Moses ende Elias met hem t'samen sprekende.
Endesepde Yoorwaer segge ick u indien ghy u niet en berandett ende wordt gelijk de kinderkens fo en sult pin het Koninckryck der emelen geensins ingaen.
And, behold, there appeared unto them Moses and Elias talking with him.
忽然，有摩西、以利亞向他們顯現，同耶穌說話。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma ti Jesus-an, Mairang, mariang ta æia-koua'n-eta hia, heirou mamoei-kow, nda mei-ringei-eta hia toutouro ki ratta, animouhou-a ta sasat, à Moses-a ta sasat, à Elias-a ta sasat.

Ka ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma ti Jesus-an, Mairang, mariang ta æia-koua'n-eta hia, heirou mamoei-kow, nda mei-ringei-eta hia toutouro ki ratta, animouhou-a ta sasat, à Moses-a ta sasat, à Elias-a ta sasat.
S.TRANS: Ende Petrs antwoordende sepde tot Jesum': Heere 't1s goedt dat wp hier zijn soo ghy wilt laet ons Hier dry tabem akelen make boor Ul eenen efi boor Moses eenen endeeenenboo;Elias,
Soowic dan hem [elben sal bernederen gelyck dit kindeken dese 1s de meeste in het koninckriick der Hemelen.
Then answered Peter, and said unto Jesus, Lord, it is good for us to be here: if thou wilt, let us make here three tabernacles; one for thee, and one for Moses, and one for Elias.
彼得對耶穌說：「主啊，我們在這裏真好！你若願意，我就在這裏搭三座棚，一座為你，一座為摩西，一座為以利亞。」

S.FORM: Tou pasousou-en-appa tyn, k'ytt'ei, ta pourarei ka maræmæh ka ni-tma mourrap neini-æn. Ka kytt'ei ta yngau ka makka poura-rei, koun, Ti atta ta Alak au ka kavæ'ængo-en-au ka kamau-en-au ta teni, millingigh-å tyni-æn.

Tou pasousou-en-appa tyn, k'ytt'ei, ta pourarei ka maræmæh ka ni-tma mourrap neini-æn. Ka kytt'ei ta yngau ka makka poura-rei, koun, Ti atta ta Alak au ka kavæ'ængo-en-au ka kamau-en-au ta teni, millingigh-å tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Dewijle hy noch sprack Niet een luchtighe wolcke heeft harr oberfchaduwet. Ende iet een ftemme upt de wolcke segghende Dese is myn geliefde Zone in den welcken ick myn welbehagen hebbe hoort hem.
Ende foo wie foodanig een kindeken. ontfange in mijnen Name die ontfangt my.
While he yet spake, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them: and behold a voice out of the cloud, which said, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased; hear ye him.
說話之間，忽然有一朵光明的雲彩遮蓋他們，且有聲音從雲彩裏出來，說：「這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的。你們要聽他！」

S.FORM: Ka rou illing-hen [ta atta] ki Pahtatæutæu-han, ni-dmangus ki vlung nein, ka ouhang ta neni ki tahkout.
Ka rou illing-hen [ta atta] ki Pahtatæutæu-han, ni-dmangus ki vlung nein, ka ouhang ta neni ki tahkout.
S.TRANS: Ende de Discipelen [dit] hoorende bielen op haer aengesichte ende wierden seer hebreett.
Mae soo wie een ban dese kleyne diem my oierenben egert Het ware Hem nutter dat een meulen-fteen aen synen hals gehangen ende dat hy bersoncken ware in de diepte de ree,
And when the disciples heard it, they fell on their face, and were sore afraid.
門徒聽見，就俯伏在地，極其害怕。

S.FORM: Irou ka irou-ato ta ti Jesus, ni-smoukla neini-æn, koun, 'lh-pitt-à, ynna mahtakout.
Irou ka irou-ato ta ti Jesus, ni-smoukla neini-æn, koun, 'lh-pitt-à, ynna mahtakout.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus by hae: komende raeckte fe aen ende seyde Staet op ende en beelt mer,
Wee der werelt ban de ngemillen:want het is nootsakelick dac de ergernissen Komen; Doch wee dien mensche door welcken de ergerniise komt.
And Jesus came and touched them, and said, Arise, and be not afraid.
耶穌進前來，摸他們，說：「起來，不要害怕！」

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-papassau-vavau ki matta nein, assi nein ni-kyttan ta sasasat ka timamang, dyk ti Jesus-an ka itou-saät.
Irou ka ni-papassau-vavau ki matta nein, assi nein ni-kyttan ta sasasat ka timamang, dyk ti Jesus-an ka itou-saät.
S.TRANS: Endehare oogen opHeffende en sagen sy niemant dan Jesum alleen,

Indien dan uwe handt ofte uwe boet u erghert houwt'le af ende werpt fe ban u. Het is u beter tot den leben in te gaen kreupel ofte bermincket [zijnde, JDan twee anden ofte twee boeten hebende in het eeuwighe bper geworpen te worden.
And when they had lifted up their eyes, they saw no man, save Jesus only.
他們舉目不見一人，只見耶穌在那裏。

S.FORM: Irou ka tddarim ta neni tou voukkyn, ni-likidi neini-æn ta ti Jesus, koun, Yana bana vana ki saäat ki vouel ki ky-hau-ei-en [k'atta,] tou kidi-appa ka ah-pit al-ato ta Alak ki kaæuloung ki ni-kapatei-an tyn.

Irou ka tddarim ta neni tou voukkyn, ni-likidi neini-æn ta ti Jesus, koun, Yana bana vana ki saäat ki vouel ki ky-hau-ei-en [k'atta,] tou kidi-appa ka ah-pit al-ato ta Alak ki kaæuloung ki ni-kapatei-an tyn.
S.TRANS: Ende als sy ban den bergh bergh af quamen gheboodt hae: Jesus seggende En teght niemandt dit gesichte tot dat de Sone des Men-fchen sal opgestaen zijn uyt Den dooden. . _
Ende indien uwe ooge u ergere trecktse uyt ende werptse ban n. Hec is n beter mae? ten ooge hebbende tot het leben in te gaen dan twee oogen hebbende in het helhe byer gheworpen te wor en
And as they came down from the mountain, Jesus charged them, saying, Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead.
下山的時候，耶穌吩咐他們說：「人子還沒有從死裏復活，你們不要將所看見的告訴人。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn ta Pahtatautæu-han tyn, k'ma, Mang koun ki Makou-sasoulat, ka kidi-ato ka siouro-ah iroua ta ti Elias?
Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn ta Pahtatautæu-han tyn, k'ma, Mang koun ki Makou-sasoulat, ka kidi-ato ka siouro-ah iroua ta ti Elias?
S.TRANS: Ende lijne Discipelen bracghden hem seggende Wat seggen dan de Schaiftleerde dat Elias eerft moet omen
Hiet toe dat ghy niet een ban dese klenne en beracht: want ick segge ulieden dat hare Engelen in] de e-Hemelen altydt sien Het aengelicht myns Vaders die in de Hemelenis, .
And his disciples asked him, saying, Why then say the scribes that Elias must first come?
門徒問耶穌說：「文士為甚麼說以利亞必須先來？」

S.FORM: Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Je sus k'ma neini-æn: Siouro-ah iroua ta ti Elias, ka pa-likoug-ah pa-æhpit ki mamang.
Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Je sus k'ma neini-æn: Siouro-ah iroua ta ti Elias, ka pa-likoug-ah pa-æhpit ki mamang.
S.TRANS: Boch Jesus antwoordende feyde tot haer : Elias sal wel ecrit komen ende alles wede oprechten.
Want de Sone des menlchen is gekomt om alig te makt dat berlort was.
And Jesus answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore all things.
耶穌回答說：「以利亞固然先來，並要復興萬事；

S.FORM: Râ pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka mah-kah'àto iroua ta ti Elias, ka assi nein ni-kalangin tyni-sen: râ ni-pæm't-en nein tyni-æn ta ma-mang ka ni-kamoei-in nein. Kma-appa-hynna papæ'i-alalam-ei nein ta Alak ki ka'æuloung.

Râ pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka mah-kah'àto iroua ta ti Elias, ka assi nein ni-kalangin tyni-sen: râ ni-pæm't-en nein tyni-æn ta ma-mang ka ni-kamoei-in nein. Kma-appa-hynna papæ'i-alalam-ei nein ta Alak ki ka'æuloung.
S.TRANS: Maer ick segge u dat Elias mi gekomen 18 efi sp en hebben hem niet gekent : doch sy hebben aen hem gedaen al wat sy hebbe gewilt. Also. sal oock de Sone des Menschen ban hae: lijden.
Watdunckt u mdien eenigh mensche houdert schapen hadde ende een upt deselbe af-gedwaelt ware en sal hy niet de neghen entnegentigh laten ende op de bergen henen gaende het afgedwarlde soecken $
But I say unto you, That Elias is come already, and they knew him not, but have done unto him whatsoever they listed. Likewise shall also the Son of man suffer of them.
只是我告訴你們，以利亞已經來了，人卻不認識他，竟任意待他。人子也將要這樣受他們的害。」

S.FORM: . Anna ta ni-oumhan ki Pæh-tatutæu-han ka ni-mattæi-mym-mia neini-æn ti Joannes-an ka na Tama-eulough.
. Anna ta ni-oumhan ki Pæh-tatutæu-han ka ni-mattæi-mym-mia neini-æn ti Joannes-an ka na Tama-eulough.
S.TRANS: Doe bersfonden de Discipelen dat hy haer ban Joanne den Dooper gesproken hadde. |
Ende indien het ghefchiet dat hy het selbe bindt: Doorwae: ick seggeu dathy Hem meer betblijdt ober het Tele dan ober de negen-entmegentigh die niet af-ghedwaelt en zijn geweel.
Then the disciples understood that he spake unto them of John the Baptist.
門徒這才明白耶穌所說的是指着施洗的約翰。 （可9‧14－29；路9‧37－43）

S.FORM: Ka tou oukakoun nein tou makoi-lalaulau, ni-iroua tyni-an ta sat ki vonal, ka matta-li-kourough tou douma tyni-an, ni-k'ma,
Ka tou oukakoun nein tou makoi-lalaulau, ni-iroua tyni-an ta sat ki vonal, ka matta-li-kourough tou douma tyni-an, ni-k'ma,
S.TRANS: Ende als fp by de fchare ghekomen waren quam tot hem een mensche ballende boor hem op de knyen ende seggende
Allo en is De wille niet nwes Yaders die in de Hemelen 1s dat een ban dese Klepneberloren gae.
And when they were come to the multitude, there came to him a certain man, kneeling down to him, and saying,
耶穌和門徒到了眾人那裏，有一個人來見耶穌，跪下，

S.FORM: Meirang, kaharum-au ta alak-au, ka pis-bouravourel pis koupang mapatei, ka pæ'i-lalouas pa'i-alalam: ka vounavounei mou-aring tou opoei, vounavounei-appa tou raloum.
Meirang, kaharum-au ta alak-au, ka pis-bouravourel pis koupang mapatei, ka pæ'i-lalouas pa'i-alalam: ka vounavounei mou-aring tou opoei, vounavounei-appa tou raloum.
S.TRANS: Heere ontfcymt u ober mijn [oone want hu is maentieck ende is in (waer lyden : want menighmarl de wm alt balt hy in het byer nde menighmael in herware
Mae indien uwe broeder tegen u gesondight heeft gaet henen ende beraft hem tufschen u ende Hem alleen : indien hy u Hoort soo hebt ghy uwen broeder gewonnen.
Lord, have mercy on my son: for he is lunatick, and sore vexed: for ofttimes he falleth into the fire, and oft into the water.
說：「主啊，憐憫我的兒子！他害癲癇的病很苦，屢次跌在火裏，屢次跌在水裏。

S.FORM: Ka ni-ad-au ta teni pæ-ou-qua tou Pahtatautæu-en-hou, ka assi nein pa-lpoughin tyni-æn pa-darikagh.
Ka ni-ad-au ta teni pæ-ou-qua tou Pahtatautæu-en-hou, ka assi nein pa-lpoughin tyni-æn pa-darikagh.
S.TRANS: Ende ick hebbe hem tot uwe Dilcipelen ghebracht endesp en hebben hem niet konnen genesen.
Maermdienhp [u] _ niet niet en hoort soo neemt nocheen ofte twee meth: op dat in den mondt ban twee ofte drie getuygen alle woort beliae.
And I brought him to thy disciples, and they could not cure him.
我帶他到你門徒那裏，他們卻不能醫治他。」

S.FORM: Ka rou mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, ni-koun tyn, A-lei-ah ki kavavouyl-an ka assi tna-msing ka maparit, makka mang-ah koh ki dallia ka toulam-ah-koh ymoumi-an? Makka mang-ah ki dallia ka tub'h-ei-mau-kamou? ad-auto hia ta teni paou-qua jau-an.

Ka rou mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, ni-koun tyn, A-lei-ah ki kavavouyl-an ka assi tna-msing ka maparit, makka mang-ah koh ki dallia ka toulam-ah-koh ymoumi-an? Makka mang-ah ki dallia ka tub'h-ei-mau-kamou? ad-auto hia ta teni paou-qua jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus antwoordende sepde O ongeloobig ende berkeert geiachte Hoe lange sal ick noch met u-lieden zijn + Hoe langhe al ick u noch berdragen 4 brenght hem my hier.
Ende indien hy deselbe geen gehoor en geeft so seght het der Gemeynte : ende indien hy oock der Ghemeynte geen gehoor en geeft oo ry hyu als de heyden ende de tollenaer.
Then Jesus answered and said, O faithless and perverse generation, how long shall I be with you? how long shall I suffer you? bring him hither to me.
耶穌說：「噯！這又不信又悖謬的世代啊，我在你們這裏要到幾時呢？我忍耐你們要到幾時呢？把他帶到我這裏來吧！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-matymha tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, ka ni-d'marang ta Lyttou tyni-æn, ka pædærikæh-ato ta rauwei tou patou-kidi-en k'anna ki tæ lei-râ.
Ka ni-matymha tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, ka ni-d'marang ta Lyttou tyni-æn, ka pædærikæh-ato ta rauwei tou patou-kidi-en k'anna ki tæ lei-râ.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus beltafte Hem ende de Dupbel gingh ban hem uyt ende het kint wiert genefen ban dier uyren
Doorwae segghe ick u; Al wat ghy op der aerden binden sult sal in den Hemel ghebonden wesen : ende al wat ghy op der aerden ontbinden sult sal iden Hemel ontbonden wesen,
And Jesus rebuked the devil; and he departed out of him: and the child was cured from that very hour.
耶穌斥責那鬼，鬼就出來；從此孩子就痊癒了。

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna rou ni-hmani iroua ti Jesus-an ta Pahta-tæutæuhan, ka ni-koun nein, Kæu-mang ka assi-kame ti ymi-an ni-simaki-lpough simaki-papænæh ty. ni-æn?
Tou kidi k'anna rou ni-hmani iroua ti Jesus-an ta Pahta-tæutæuhan, ka ni-koun nein, Kæu-mang ka assi-kame ti ymi-an ni-simaki-lpough simaki-papænæh ty. ni-æn?
S.TRANS: Bot quamen de Discipelen tot Jesum alleen ende sepden 1Vaerom en hebben wp. hem niet konnen-uptwerpen
Wederom segge ick n Indien daer twee ban u te faiht ttemmen op der aerden ober eenige sake die sy sonden mogen begeeren dat die hae sal gechiedt ban myn# Dade die in de Hemelen 18,
Then came the disciples to Jesus apart, and said, Why could not we cast him out?
門徒暗暗地到耶穌跟前，說：「我們為甚麼不能趕出那鬼呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini æn, Alei ki kaurou-an-noumi mna-msing: d'lligh koun-nau-kamou-râ, irou na hei mamama ki touhto ki shai ta tna-msing-an-noumi, ynna-kamou bana-vana ki voukkyn katta, d'marang-a hia mou-koua hynna, ka d'marang-ah mou-koua: ka aousi-al-ato kimamang ka assi-moumi ynanang-ei mei-pough.

Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini æn, Alei ki kaurou-an-noumi mna-msing: d'lligh koun-nau-kamou-râ, irou na hei mamama ki touhto ki shai ta tna-msing-an-noumi, ynna-kamou bana-vana ki voukkyn katta, d'marang-a hia mou-koua hynna, ka d'marang-ah mou-koua: ka aousi-al-ato kimamang ka assi-moumi ynanang-ei mei-pough.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus sepde tot haer Om uwes ongeloofs wille : want boorwaer segge ick u soo ghy ten geloobe haddet als een moltaertraedt ghy fondt tot desen brigh seggen Gaet henen ban hie: derwaerts ende hy sal henen gaen : ende niet en sal n onmogelick zijn.
Want waer twee ofte due bergadert zijn in mijnen Name daer ben ick in het midden ban haer.

And Jesus said unto them, Because of your unbelief: for verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.
耶穌說：「是因你們的信心小。我實在告訴你們，你們若有信心，像一粒芥菜種，就是對這座山說：『你從這邊挪到那邊』，它也必挪去；並且你們沒有一件不能做的事了。

S.FORM: Râ kidi ki nanang k'atta assi padarang-in, dyk ki pako Ali-lid-den ki i-rikht-en appa.
Râ kidi ki nanang k'atta assi padarang-in, dyk ki pako Ali-lid-den ki i-rikht-en appa.
S.TRANS: Waer Maet dit geslachte en baere niet upt dan door bidden ende balten.
Doe quam Petrus tot hem ende eyde Heere hoe menigmael sal myn broeder tegen my sondigen mds ick emhem bergheben + Tot sebenmael +
Howbeit this kind goeth not out but by prayer and fasting.
至於這一類的鬼，若不禱告、禁食，他就不出來 。」 （可9‧30－32；路9‧43－45）

S.FORM: Tou hi-kakou-'an nein [mou-næunang] tou Galileä, ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, pää-tounnoun-eih ta Alak ki ka'æu-loung tou rima ki ka'æuloung.
Tou hi-kakou-'an nein [mou-næunang] tou Galileä, ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, pää-tounnoun-eih ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou rima ki ka'æuloung.
S.TRANS: Ei als spin Galilea berkeerden sepde Jesus tot haer De Sone des Menscht sal obergelebert worden in de handen der menschen,
Jesus leyde tot hem Ick en legge u niet tot lebenmael mae? tot tlebentigh mael seben-[mael.]
And while they abode in Galilee, Jesus said unto them, The Son of man shall be betrayed into the hands of men:
他們還住在加利利的時候，耶穌對門徒說：「人子將要被交在人手裏。

S.FORM: Ka pakapatei-ah tyni-æn, ka papatti-mauǣ-auh tou kata-touro ki wæi. Ka ouhang mivou-las ta neni.
Ka pakapatei-ah tyni-æn, ka papatti-mauǣ-auh tou kata-touro ki wæi. Ka ouhang mivou-las ta neni.
S.TRANS: Ende sy sullen hem dooden ende ten derden dage sal hy opgewecke worden. Ende sy wierds seer bedroeft.
Daeroniwort het Koninckryck de Hemelen bergeleken by een scke; Koning die reeckeninghe met shne dienstknechten hound? wilde.
And they shall kill him, and the third day he shall be raised again. And they were exceeding sorry.
他們要殺害他，第三日他要復活。」門徒就大大地憂愁。

S.FORM: Ka tou ou-kakoun nein tou Kapernæum, ni-mou-koua ti Pe-trus-an ta Tama-jmuh ki Di-dragh. ma, ka ni-k'ma, Assi kaua pou-daæuh ki Di-dragh-ma ta Tama Mahtæutuuh ymoumi-æn?
Ka tou ou-kakoun nein tou Kapernæum, ni-mou-koua ti Petrus-an ta Tama-jmuh ki Di-dragh. ma, ka ni-k'ma, Assi kaua pou-daæuh ki Di-dragh-ma ta Tama Mahtæutuuh ymoumi-æn?
S.TRANS: Endeals(p te Capernamm in ghekomen waren gingen tot Petrum die de Didrachmen ontfingen ende sepde Uwe meester en betaelt hy de Didrachmen niet +
Als hy nu begon te reeckenen wierdt tot hem gebracht een die hem schuldigh was tien duylent talenten.
And when they were come to Capernaum, they that received tribute money came to Peter, and said, Doth not your master pay tribute?
到了迦百農，有收丁稅的人來見彼得，說：「你們的先生不納丁稅嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-koun tyn, Hahei. Ka rou ni-mou-rbo tou tallagh, ni-ma-æuro masousou tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, ka ni-koun tyn, Pæh-mang kow pæh-dimdim Simon? Mara na mang-an ta si-bavau Mei-sasou ki Næi ki pouh-tanang-en pou-da augh ki 'a-ymh-an lava? ki Alalak nein kaua ki rarouma kaua?

Ni-koun tyn, Hahei. Ka rou ni-mou-rbo tou tallagh, ni-ma-æuro masousou tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, ka ni-koun tyn, Pæh-mang kow pæh-dimdim Simon? Mara na mang-an ta si-bavau Mei-sasou ki Næi ki pouh-tanang-en pou-da augh ki 'a-ymh-an lava? ki Alalak nein kaua ki rarouma kaua?
S.TRANS: hHy feyde Jae. Ende doe hy in huys ghekomen was boorquam hem Jesus seggende Wat dunckt u Simon? De Koninghen der aerden ban wien nemen fp tollen ofte schattinghes ban Hare sonen ofte ban den bremden +
Endeals hy niet en Hadde om te betalen bebal tin Heere datmen hem sonde berkoopen ende shn wyf ende kinderen ende al wat Hy hadde ende dat[de {chult] foude betaelt worden.

He saith, Yes. And when he was come into the house, Jesus prevented him, saying, What thinkest thou, Simon? of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers?
彼得說：「納。」他進了屋子，耶穌先向他說：「西門，你的意思如何？世上的君王向誰征收關稅、丁稅？是向自己的兒子呢？是向外人呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Petrus tyni-æn, Ki rarouma. Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Anna ta ta'ä-nyn-no ta Alalak assi pou-daæuh.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Petrus tyni-æn, Ki rarouma. Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Anna ta ta'ä-nyn-no ta Alalak assi pou-daæuh.
S.TRANS: Petyus seyde tot ham Pan den bremden. Jesus sepde tot hem Hoo 3yn dan de conen bry.
De dienltknecht dan neder ballende aenbadt hem leggende Heere weest lanckmoedigh ober my ende ick sal n alles betalen.
Peter saith unto him, Of strangers. Jesus saith unto him, Then are the children free.
彼得說：「是向外人。」耶穌說：「既然如此，兒子就可以免稅了。

S.FORM: Râ alei ka assi-mytta pæ-sai-sala-kouap ta neni, mou-væ-oung-a, pa-heiriryng-an-ei ta hei-ryng, ka arau ta thing ka mou-ouro mou-vavau, ka rou tias-au ta moutous tyn, ka-bælei-au-mhou ta Stater [ka malitouk: ] arau ta anna, ka p'hæan-ei'to neini-æn alei jau-an, alei-appa ymhou-an. Ka sasat kytti-an'æb ki kæuighpa kilbægh ki soulat.

Râ alei ka assi-mytta pæ-sai-sala-kouap ta neni, mou-væ-oung-a, pa-heiriryng-an-ei ta hei-ryng, ka arau ta thing ka mou-ouro mou-vavau, ka rou tias-au ta moutous tyn, ka-bælei-au-mhou ta Stater [ka malitouk: ] arau ta anna, ka p'hæan-ei'to neini-æn alei jau-an, alei-appa ymhou-an. Ka sasat kytti-an'æb ki kæuighpa kilbægh ki soulat.
S.TRANS: Mae: op dat wy haer geenen aenstoot en geben gaet henen nae de ree werpt den angel[uyt,Jeti den ecasten bisch bisch die op komt neemt efi sijnen mondt geopent hebbende sult ghy cenen [tater binden: neemt dien ende geeft hem haer boor my efi u.I E dier selber uyre quamen de Discipelen tot Jefum leggende Wie is doch de meelte in't Koninckriick der Hemelen $
Ende de Heere deses dienstknechts met baymherrighepdr innerlick beweegt zijnde heeft hem ontsiiagen ende de [chult hem quijt ghesrholden.

Notwithstanding, lest we should offend them, go thou to the sea, and cast an hook, and take up the fish that first cometh up; and when thou hast opened his mouth, thou shalt find a piece of money: that take, and give unto them for me and thee.
但恐怕觸犯他們，你且往海邊去釣魚，把先釣上來的魚拿起來，開了牠的口，必得一塊錢，可以拿去給他們，作你我的稅銀。」
